ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "formatted_column" TEXT /* Formatted column content of the article */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "journal_volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "journal_issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "page_range" TEXT /* Page range of the article in the journal */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract or summary of the article */,
  "index" INTEGER /* Index number of the article */,
  "similarity" REAL /* Similarity score of the article to other articles */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the article */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been cited */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal issue in which the article was published */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Information about the funding sources for the research */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the article for better searchability */,
  "pdf_url" TEXT /* URL to the PDF version of the article */,
  "html_url" TEXT /* URL to the HTML version of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_volume FOREIGN KEY ("journal_volume") REFERENCES issues ("volume"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES issues ("publication_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_issue FOREIGN KEY ("journal_issue") REFERENCES issues ("issue")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author's affiliation */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or background information of the author */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the author for unique identification */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "publication_count" INTEGER /* Total number of publications by the author */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of citations received by the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  "current_position" TEXT /* Current position of the author */,
  "personal_website" TEXT /* URL to the author's personal or professional website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the institution's website */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was established */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the research area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research area */,
  "parent_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent research area (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "research_area_weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the research area within the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_areas_parent_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_area_id") REFERENCES research_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-author relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the article (e.g., first author, second author) */,
  "contribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the author's contribution to the article */,
  "is_corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the author is the corresponding author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_authors_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_areas" (
  "article_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-research area relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_areas_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_areas_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES research_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, librarian, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's affiliation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation_id") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the article */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the article */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the journal's website */,
  "editor_in_chief" TEXT /* Name of the editor-in-chief of the journal */,
  "issn_online" TEXT /* Online ISSN of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the issue */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the issue */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was published */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the cover image of the issue */,
  "editorial_board" TEXT /* List of editorial board members for the issue */,
  "special_issue" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the issue is a special issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)
